author.bio: Twitch Streamer, Esports Communications @Braver_pt and music addicted person living the fandom life.
author.name: Ana Guerra

content.text:
Me - *bounces head while working*
Friend - Why are you so happy?
Me - Because there is nothing to be unhappy about.
